prompt: Transform casual notes about git rebase vs merge into professional blog post

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: professional_tone
assertions.description: Transforms casual/informal input into professional, polished content

assertions.name: concept_style_used
assertions.description: Uses concept explanation style to teach when to use each approach

assertions.name: has_visual_diagrams
assertions.description: Includes git history visualizations showing merge vs rebase results

assertions.name: emphasizes_golden_rule
assertions.description: Prominently warns against rebasing public branches

assertions.name: covers_all_points
assertions.description: Covers: merge commits, history rewriting, when to use each, interactive rebase, pull --rebase

assertions.name: has_workflow_guidance
assertions.description: Provides practical workflow recommendations for teams
